name: ldom1-ai-dotfiles
description: Personal AI skills for Claude Code — Local Brain (brain-sync, brain-load), knowledge graphs (graphify), GitHub PRs (create-pr), token optimization (token-watch, token-guard, finops-audit)

plugins.name: brain-sync
plugins.description: Sync your Local Brain (Obsidian vault) at session start and end via git pull/push. Stashes dirty state, rebases, commits and pushes automatically.

plugins.name: brain-load
plugins.description: Load your Local Brain project note into Claude context at session start. Auto-instantiates a new project note from template if missing, with CAP (area of responsibility) mapping.

plugins.name: create-pr
plugins.description: Open a GitHub PR using gh and ai-dotfiles git conventions — branch prefix (feature/, fix/, enh/), conventional commits, gh pr create workflow.

plugins.name: token-watch
plugins.description: Snapshot current token burn rate via ccusage — active 5h window, daily per-model breakdown, session history.

plugins.name: token-guard
plugins.description: Model routing heuristic (Sonnet/Opus/Haiku) and /model-check command. Emits routing reminder before multi-step tasks.

plugins.name: finops-audit
plugins.description: Weekly token spend review via ccusage — structured report appended to finops-history.md.

plugins.name: graphify
plugins.description: Corpus → knowledge graph: clustering, HTML/JSON exports, Obsidian, GraphRAG queries. Trigger /graphify.
